confidence_errors.name: FP_scam_awareness_discussion
confidence_errors.issue: HIGH confidence on WRONG verdict (SCAM vs expected SAFE)

false_positives.name: FP_scam_awareness_discussion
false_positives.explanation: Anti-scam awareness discussion quoting scam tactics. Contains 'OTP', 'warrant', 'digital arrest' in a meta-discussion context. Meta-indicator guard should fire.
reasons: Caller claims to be a government/law-enforcement authority
Monetary request detected from other party
Significant escalation: urgency and pressure introduced mid-conversation

over_detection_list.name: FP_colleague_petty_cash
over_detection_list.explanation: Legitimate debt repayment reminder. 'You owe me' triggers money-intent scorer and GPay triggers transfer-method pattern despite this being benign.
reasons: Monetary request detected from other party
Payment transfer method specified (UPI/NEFT/RTGS/crypto)
Mild escalation: tone shifted toward urgency

over_detection_list.name: FP_friend_loan_repayment
over_detection_list.explanation: Friendly loan request with casual tone (yaar/bhai). NEFT + Rs 5000 + tonight will likely trigger rule engine and urgency scorer. Should remain SAFE.
reasons: Casual familiar tone suggests known contact
Monetary request detected from other party
Mild escalation: tone shifted toward urgency

over_detection_list.name: FP_splitting_restaurant_bill
over_detection_list.explanation: Bill splitting among friends. Contains UPI + money amount. Should be safe given the social context and mutual tone.
reasons: Monetary request detected from other party
Mild escalation: tone shifted toward urgency
Unverified person requesting money with minimal relationship context

over_detection_list.name: FP_gig_worker_payment_followup
over_detection_list.explanation: Legitimate payment for services rendered. Contains PhonePe, phone number, amount. Anomaly scorer may flag unknown person + money request.
reasons: Payment transfer method specified (UPI/NEFT/RTGS/crypto)
Risk Scores — ML: 0.80 | Rules: 0.00 (eff: 0.00) | Vector: 0.00 | Conversation: 0.17 [rel=0.50, money=0.20, esc=0.00, emo=0.00, ano=0.00]

over_detection_list.name: BOUND_vague_polite_money_request
over_detection_list.explanation: Very vague request, no amount, no method, no urgency. Polite tone. Should not trigger SCAM — at most SUSPICIOUS due to money framing.
reasons: One-sided conversation — no response from user recorded
Risk Scores — ML: 0.80 | Rules: 0.00 (eff: 0.00) | Vector: 0.00 | Conversation: 0.14 [rel=0.50, money=0.00, esc=0.00, emo=0.00, ano=0.10]

over_detection_list.name: BOUND_urgent_real_medical_no_money
over_detection_list.explanation: Genuine family emergency with no financial ask. Urgency words present but resolves without money request. Should not be SCAM.
reasons: Significant escalation: urgency and pressure introduced mid-conversation
Conversation opened with immediate urgency — no rapport building
Urgency language detected to pressure action

over_detection_list.name: BOUND_formal_unknown_sender_no_demand
over_detection_list.explanation: Cold outreach without financial demand. Formal tone may trigger relationship scorer but no money, OTP, or authority claim present.
reasons: Formal/impersonal tone from an unverified contact
Unverified identity assertion detected
Unverified familiarity claim — asserting prior relationship without context

over_detection_list.name: EVO_suspicious_resolves_safe
over_detection_list.explanation: Insurance call that seems initially suspicious but resolves safely with proper redirection and explicit 'never ask OTP' assurance.
reasons: Caller claims to be a government/law-enforcement authority
Urgency language detected to pressure action
OTP sharing request detected

over_detection_list.name: EDGE_safe_money_flow_to_user
over_detection_list.explanation: Money flowing TO the user. Asking for UPI ID to send (not receive) money. Anomaly scorer may still flag UPI + money mention.
reasons: Payment transfer method specified (UPI/NEFT/RTGS/crypto)
UPI transfer request detected
